original_description: Expert coding skill for building interactive web maps with MapTiler SDK JS (built on MapLibre GL JS). USE WHEN the user wants to add a map to a web application, show locations on a map, display geographic data, build a store locator, create data visualizations on maps, add geocoding or address search, show routes or GPS tracks, display 3D terrain or globe view, use satellite imagery, add markers or popups, create heatmaps or clustering, embed static map images, get elevation data, or do IP geolocation. Also USE WHEN the user mentions MapLibre GL JS — MapTiler SDK extends MapLibre with built-in cloud services, helpers, and session billing. Covers React, Vue, Svelte, Angular, Next.js, and vanilla JS. Includes MapTiler Cloud REST APIs, vector layer helpers, weather visualization, and framework-specific patterns.
best_description: ALWAYS invoke this skill when the user's request involves a map, mapping, markers, geocoding, addresses, coordinates, locations on a map, geographic visualization, or spatial data in a web context. This is the primary skill for web mapping tasks — interactive maps, static map images, address search/autocomplete, reverse geocoding, GeoJSON display, marker clustering, heatmaps, 3D terrain, globe views, satellite imagery, weather overlays, map theming (dark/light), GPS tracks, elevation, geolocation, and route display. Covers React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Angular, vanilla JS. Also applies when the user mentions MapLibre GL JS. If the word "map" appears in a web development context, or the user wants to show places, points, or geographic data visually — trigger this skill.
final_description: TRIGGER THIS SKILL for any web development task where the user wants to display a map, work with geographic coordinates, or build location-based features. This is the default mapping skill — it handles interactive maps, static map images, markers, popups, geocoding, address autocomplete, reverse geocoding, store locators, GeoJSON, clustering, heatmaps, 3D terrain, globe views, satellite imagery, weather layers, dark/light map themes, GPS tracks, elevation, geolocation, routes, and all MapLibre GL JS work. Supports React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, Angular, vanilla JS. If the user's task involves showing anything on a map, finding/displaying locations, or geographic data in a browser — always invoke this skill first.

history.description: Use this skill whenever the user's task involves a map, geographic visualization, or location-based feature on the web. Triggers include: displaying an interactive or static map, placing markers or popups, rendering GeoJSON (points, lines, polygons), heatmaps, clustering, geocoding/address search, GPX/GPS track display, 3D terrain, globe view, satellite imagery, weather layers, map style switching (dark/light), elevation data, IP geolocation, or integrating any of these into React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, or Angular. Also use when the user mentions MapLibre GL JS — MapTiler SDK extends it with built-in cloud services. If the query involves showing anything on a map or working with geographic/spatial data in a web context, invoke this skill first.

train_results.query: when the user clicks on the map I want to show the address of that point in a popup
we're using maplibre-gl directly right now but want to add geocoding and better styles, is there a wrapper or SDK that helps?
create a reusable map component for our Next.js 14 App Router project, needs to work with server components, show user location
we're building a store locator page for our retail chain — user types a city, sees nearest shops on a map with pins, clicks for details

I need to generate a static map image showing a delivery location for our order confirmation emails, no JS just a PNG
I have 10000 markers on a map and it's super slow, how do I cluster them so it performs well?
add a wind speed and temperature overlay to my map, like a weather radar layer
I have a checkout form and need an address autocomplete field that geocodes what the user types and shows it on a small map preview
my app has dark mode, I need the map to switch between light and dark styles when the user toggles the theme
I need to add an interactive map to my React app showing our office locations, the user should be able to pan and zoom
build me an outdoor map with 3D terrain showing elevation for a hiking app, user should see the mountains in 3D

Create a bar chart and line chart dashboard showing monthly sales data using D3.js
